titleStmt.title: SII 26.418: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 418. (A.R. No. 397 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same verandah.

p.hi: Vīra-Dēvarāya-Uḍaiyar: Śaka 1329, Sarvajit, Mēsha (Chittirai,) śu-3, Wednesday, Rōhiṇi = 1407 A.D., April 11, But the week-day was Monday.

summary.p: This inscription states that Śiṟṟiṇgūr was situated on the southern bank of the Peṇṇai river and was a brahadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Irāsarāśa-vaḷanāḍu. It records that the sabhai of Vinōdanallūr in the same nāḍu had bought some land from the Tirunāmattukkāṇi land of the temple of Tiruppulippagava-nāyaṉār of Śiṟṟiṅgūr for digging an irrigation channel and while digging, a land to the extent of one and half a mā was found in excess. In lieu of this, the above mentioned sabhai gave away some fields from the nañjai land of their village to the tānattār of the temple. This gift is termed as tiruppaṇi-paṟṟu (i.e. the land given for temple repairs).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . mahāmaṇṭalicuraṉ Arirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ śrīvira
tevarāya Uṭaiyar piṟutivirāciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 2 10 9 Itaṉ
mel cellāniṉṟa rsavaciṟ varuṣam meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tṛtiyaiyum pu
taṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rośaṇi nāḷ Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭuk kuṟukkaikūṟṟattu peṇ
ṇait teṉkarai piṟummadecam ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavanāyaṉārku Iṉṉāṭṭu vino
tanallūr capaiyār Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyil Eṅkaḷūrku nirpāya nāṅkaḷ Iṟuttu veṭṭukaiyil Inilacetamāṉa nilamāy Aḷantukaṇṭa nilam Oru māvaraikkum
nilattukku nilamāka Eṅkaḷūril nañcai nilattu kuṭiniṅkā tevatāṉattukku viṭṭa Āḷavantanāya^1^ṉār Aruḷicceyalpaṭikku viṭṭa ceykku kiḻakku tāṉakuṇṭil
ku 2 100 5 10 nāvitaṉ kuṇṭil ku 8 neṟkuppai kaṇakkaṉ kuṇṭil kuḻi 5 10 Itaṉaṭaiviṭṭu teṟku paḻaiya tiruviḷakkuppaṟṟu
meṟku nārāyaṇa kuṇṭil kuḻi 5 10 5 peru māṉ kuṇṭil kuḻi 2 100 kiṇaṟu taṭi kuḻi 2 100 5 Āka kuḻi 1000 2 100 5 10 kku nila
m Irumāvaraiyum taṇṭukarai Aracukku kiḻakku tiruviḷakkupuṟam Ellaikku meṟkku kku vaṭakku tākku Oṉṟu kuḻi 5 10 Āka Ivvakaippaṭi nilam
cantiṟātittavaraiyum cella tiruppaṇi paṟṟāka viṭṭom Inta nāyaṉār koyil taāṉattārkku capaiyārom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.418 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
